steps: Start with a five-component Java record in the order String, String, long, String, String.

Run generation and compilation for that selected example.
Observe that generation appends java.time.Instant occurredAt without reordering the existing components, then also emits a pending Object-returning accessor with the same name.
Observe javac reject the duplicate record accessor before example execution.
